title: Fatal House Fire Claims Two Lives in Rowan County
summary: A late-night house fire on Saw Road in Rowan County resulted in two fatalities. Crews responded to the scene just before midnight Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the critical need for fire safety and emergency response effectiveness in residential areas.

title: Rock Hill Public Transportation to Introduce $2.50 Fare
summary: Rock Hill My Ride passengers may soon pay $2.50 per ride, ending the previous no-cost service for public transportation users.
charlotte_impact: Impacts accessibility and affordability of public transit for local residents, especially low-income individuals.

title: UNC Charlotte Adjusts Housing Policy to Align with Federal Guidance
summary: UNC Charlotte discontinues gender-affirming housing to comply with federal guidelines, reaffirming its commitment to student support.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing debates about federal regulations and university policies regarding student housing and inclusivity.

title: Man Charged in South Charlotte Strip Club Shooting
summary: A 22-year-old man is charged with shooting another individual at Club Onyx in South Charlotte early Sunday morning.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about violence and safety in entertainment venues and the broader community.

title: Novant Health Plans Freestanding Emergency Department in SouthPark
summary: Novant Health seeks approval for a $21.3 million freestanding emergency department in SouthPark, slated for completion in January 2029.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the growing demand for accessible emergency medical services in the SouthPark area.

title: Pleasant Temperatures Expected with Scattered Showers and Storms
summary: A cold front will bring scattered showers and thunderstorms on Monday, with sunshine returning by Tuesday in the Charlotte region.
charlotte_impact: Provides a routine weather update, impacting daily planning and outdoor activities for residents.

title: Man Accused of Impersonating Officer in Road Rage Incident
summary: A road rage incident led to the arrest of a driver accused of impersonating a police officer using blue lights.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of road rage and the potential for misuse of authority, impacting public trust.

title: Experts: New Grads Should Worry Less About AI, More About Experience
summary: Economists suggest new graduates should focus on gaining experience, as companies often prefer experienced workers over entry-level AI concerns.
charlotte_impact: Offers insights into the job market and career advice for recent graduates navigating economic changes.

title: Child Injured in Hit-and-Run Near Quail Hollow Middle School
summary: An 8-year-old child suffered serious injuries in a hit-and-run incident near Quail Hollow Middle School on Saturday.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for increased traffic safety measures around schools and pedestrian areas.

title: Former Mayor Roberts Offers to Serve as Interim Mayor
summary: Jennifer Roberts, former Charlotte mayor, volunteers to serve as unpaid interim mayor, pledging not to seek another term in 2027.
charlotte_impact: Addresses leadership transition and potential political shifts in Charlotte's municipal government.

title: Gaston County Gynecologist Accused of Sexual Assault
summary: A Gaston County gynecologist is facing a lawsuit alleging sexual assault during a routine examination. Doctor previously reprimanded for unrelated misconduct.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious ethical and legal concerns about patient safety and professional conduct in healthcare.

title: Arson Investigation Launched After North Charlotte Apartment Fire
summary: Police are investigating a weekend apartment fire in north Charlotte as arson, with heavy smoke affecting four units.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the potential for intentional property damage and the importance of arson prevention.

title: Fire Breaks Out at Davidson College Fraternity House
summary: A fire at Davidson College's Kappa Sigma fraternity house prompted a multi-department response early Sunday. No injuries were reported.
charlotte_impact: Addresses safety concerns within educational institutions and the effectiveness of emergency response protocols.

title: Suspect Found Hiding in Ceiling of Gastonia Hospital
summary: Two suspects were arrested after Flock cameras identified them driving stolen motorcycles; one was found hiding in the ceiling of a Gastonia hospital.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the use of surveillance technology in crime prevention and the challenges of hospital security.

title: Local NICU Nurse Celebrated During National Nurses Week
summary: A profile on a local NICU nurse highlights the dedication and impact of nurses during National Nurses Week.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes the contributions of healthcare professionals and their role in providing compassionate care.
